title: Chippy
short_description: Serve customers the right orders in this unique time-management game for all ages.
description: Chippy is a time-management game developed by Glitchers, set in a fish and chip shop. Players must serve customers the right orders quickly and accurately across increasingly hectic levels. Self-funded and originally released in 2013, it was well received — Pocket Gamer called it "addictive stuff" — and is now available through GameClub.
